name: @omni/adapters-vscode
description: VS Code adapter for the Omni IDE multi-IDE extension framework.

omni.llm.provider.markdownDescription: LLM provider for all Omni AI features. Built-in values: `copilot`, `claude`. Any registered provider ID is accepted — new providers are available immediately after the adapter registers them without requiring a settings schema change.

omni.llm.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for providers that require one (e.g. `claude`, `grok`). **Not needed for `copilot`** — it uses IDE authentication. For production use, prefer storing the key in VS Code Secret Storage instead.

omni.llm.model.markdownDescription: Model override for the selected provider. Leave blank to use each provider's default model. Examples: `gpt-4o`, `claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022`, `grok-2`.

omni.llm.providerOptions.markdownDescription: Additional provider-specific options passed as-is to the LLM adapter. Consult each provider adapter's documentation for supported keys.
